name: STANDARDS-URLS: each rubric source.id must have a matching key in STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  authoritative_url: https://acme.example.com/standard
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml#src-1
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' > rule.yaml

printf 'src-2:
  publisher: A
  url: https://a.com
  license: CC-BY-4.0
  last_verified: 2026-05-04
' > STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
